creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
In my third proposal I have resolved the CONFLICTS with jabberd-2.x and
added more features.

I made the following changes:
- renamed PORTNAME to jabberd14
- renamed ${LOCALBASE}/bin/jabberd to ${LOCALBASE}/bin/jabberd14
- renamed the RCng startup script to jabberd14
- changed /var/spool/jabberd to /var/spool/jabberd14 etc.
- removed the automatic creation of /var/log/jabberd (default logging is
syslog)
- added USE_GETTEXT=yes
- added the NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES knob
- added pkg-message

As I wrote in my previous followup, a repocopy to jabberd14 would be
excellent.

net-im/jabber (net-im/jabberd14) and net-im/jabberd are now able to
co-exist on the same system
If the port moves to net-im/jabberd14 and changes PORTNAME, there might
be no need for PORTEPOCH,
if it is needed, it can be added to Makefile (see portlint log)

URL of the patch:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.2.patch

URL of complete .tar.gz:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.2.tar.gz

Portlint:
WARN: Makefile: [91]: use ${VARIABLE}, instead of $(VARIABLE).
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a WITHOUT_NLS knob to
conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/run/jabberd14".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/spool/jabberd14".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/log/jabberd14".
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section
empty, to make CVS happy.
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding
additional mirrors.
FATAL: Makefile: jabberd14-1.6.0 < jabber-1.4.4,1. Choose another
PORTVERSION or bump PORTEPOCH.
1 fatal error and 7 warnings found.

Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/jabberd14-1.6.0.log
